name: edge-case-continue-flag
task: Run /autoresearch helm --continue --hint 'The failing assertions are about values.yaml structure — try adding explicit template examples to the reference files'
assertions: Response checks out the existing autoresearch/helm branch rather than creating a new one
Response loads the existing autoresearch-helm-log.json to restore loop state
Response diffs current evals against the eval snapshot in the log and reports any changes
Response incorporates the hint into its root-cause analysis for the first new iteration
Response does NOT reset the iteration counter — it continues numbering from the prior run
